scripts.seed: cd scripts && uv run --project ../apps/agent python seed_content.py
scripts.dev:agent: cd apps/agent && uv run --env-file ../../.env python agent.py dev
scripts.lint: bun run typecheck && bunx eslint --max-warnings 0 . && bunx prettier --check 'apps/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'packages/**/*.ts' && cd apps/agent && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint:fix: bunx eslint --fix . && bunx prettier --write 'apps/**/*.{ts,tsx}' 'packages/**/*.ts' && cd apps/agent && uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
scripts.test: bun test --cwd apps/server && bun test --cwd apps/mobile
scripts.test:all: bun test --cwd apps/server && bun test --cwd apps/mobile && cd apps/agent && uv run pytest tests/ -q
